name: SelectedCarrierObservationDimensionExtraction
model: carrier-indexed Lambda model with ObsDim(C, lam) = 2 * (C.arity.succ + lam) and TranscriptDim(C, lam) = C.arity.succ + lam
boundary: Carrier-indexed selected observation-dimension extraction only; does not assert unrestricted Chronos-RR, H4.1/FGL, P-vs-NP, Clay-problem closure, unrestricted admissible-predicate coverage, universal FiberEntropyGap, or closure of the original constant-observation selected interface.
